reviews.comment:
Los baños están en abandono rotos y no muy limpios una lastima YPF debería preocuparse un poco en brindar un mejor servicio que pagamos todos con nuestros impuestos y carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are dilapidated, broken, and not very clean. It's a shame. YPF should be more concerned about providing better service, which we all pay for with our taxes and fuel purchases.

reviews.comment:
Buena limpieza en baños . Linda atención también la sra w asiste el baño buena onda . El kiosco variado limpio .

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean. The service was also very friendly; the lady who assisted in the restroom was nice. The kiosk was clean and had a good selection of items.

Very good and fast service. The coffee and croissants are outstanding. The bathrooms are in good condition.
